Klasse MqttProtocolAdapter

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.iot.MqttProtocolAdapter
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
IoTProtocol
public class MqttProtocolAdapter extends Object implements IoTProtocol
MQTT protocol adapter for communicating with physical IoT devices. Requires an external MQTT broker (e.g. Mosquitto) to be running. This adapter defines the MQTT topic structure: - Commands: smarthome/devices/{deviceId}/command - State: smarthome/devices/{deviceId}/state

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    MqttProtocolAdapter(String brokerUrl)
    Creates an MQTT adapter configured for the given broker.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    connect()
    Opens the connection to the underlying hardware or broker.
    void
    disconnect()
    Closes the connection and releases any associated resources.
    String
    getBrokerUrl()
    Returns the broker URL this adapter is configured for.
    String
    getProtocolName()
    Returns a short identifier of the protocol implementation (e.g., "MOCK", "MQTT").
    boolean
    isConnected()
    Indicates whether the protocol adapter currently has an open connection.
    void
    sendCommand(DeviceCommand command)
    Sends a command to the target hardware.
    void
    subscribe(String topic, Consumer<DeviceEvent> listener)
    Subscribes to events published on the given topic.
    void
    unsubscribe(String topic)
    Removes a previous subscription.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

  • Konstruktordetails

    • MqttProtocolAdapter

      public MqttProtocolAdapter(String brokerUrl)
      Creates an MQTT adapter configured for the given broker.
      Parameter:
      brokerUrl - the MQTT broker URL (e.g., tcp://localhost:1883)

  • Methodendetails

    • connect

      public void connect() throws IoTException
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: IoTProtocol
      Opens the connection to the underlying hardware or broker.
      Angegeben von:
      connect in Schnittstelle IoTProtocol
      Löst aus:
      IoTException - if the connection cannot be established

    • disconnect

      public void disconnect()
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: IoTProtocol
      Closes the connection and releases any associated resources.
      Angegeben von:
      disconnect in Schnittstelle IoTProtocol

    • isConnected

      public boolean isConnected()
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: IoTProtocol
      Indicates whether the protocol adapter currently has an open connection.
      Angegeben von:
      isConnected in Schnittstelle IoTProtocol
      Gibt zurück:
      true when connected, false otherwise

    • sendCommand

      public void sendCommand(DeviceCommand command) throws IoTException
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: IoTProtocol
      Sends a command to the target hardware.
      Angegeben von:
      sendCommand in Schnittstelle IoTProtocol
      Parameter:
      command - the command to dispatch
      Löst aus:
      IoTException - if the command cannot be delivered

    • subscribe

      public void subscribe(String topic, Consumer<DeviceEvent> listener) throws IoTException
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: IoTProtocol
      Subscribes to events published on the given topic.
      Angegeben von:
      subscribe in Schnittstelle IoTProtocol
      Parameter:
      topic - the topic to subscribe to
      listener - callback invoked for each received event
      Löst aus:
      IoTException - if the subscription cannot be registered

    • unsubscribe

      public void unsubscribe(String topic) throws IoTException
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: IoTProtocol
      Removes a previous subscription.
      Angegeben von:
      unsubscribe in Schnittstelle IoTProtocol
      Parameter:
      topic - the topic to unsubscribe from
      Löst aus:
      IoTException - if unsubscription fails

    • getProtocolName

      public String getProtocolName()
      Beschreibung aus Schnittstelle kopiert: IoTProtocol
      Returns a short identifier of the protocol implementation (e.g., "MOCK", "MQTT").
      Angegeben von:
      getProtocolName in Schnittstelle IoTProtocol
      Gibt zurück:
      the protocol name

    • getBrokerUrl

      public String getBrokerUrl()
      Returns the broker URL this adapter is configured for.
      Gibt zurück:
      the MQTT broker URL
